title: Negative-control specificity diagnostic

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: Multiple controls match or exceed the primary delta Spearman, so the apparent favorable direction is not IPV-specific.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

panel_map.a: Primary and control deltas with uncertainty intervals.
panel_map.b: Count of controls matching or exceeding the primary estimate.
panel_map.c: Degradation controls that did not degrade as expected.

evidence_hierarchy.hero_evidence: Primary and control deltas with uncertainty intervals.
evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: Controls prevent an IPV-specific robustness claim.

statistics_notes: Panel a shows delta Spearman with bootstrap 95% CIs; hatched red markers match or exceed the primary estimate.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: Controls prevent an IPV-specific robustness claim.
